hero.title: Xworkmate
hero.subtitle: 涵盖 App LiteLLM、OpenClaw、QMD 等智能代理与模型路由调度，赋予应用真正的 AI 原生能力。

showcases.title: 智能代理矩阵
showcases.description: 利用高级多智能体架构进行任务协作。不管是大模型的接入，还是基于上下文的精准响应，Xworkmate 为您全盘搞定。

showcases.title: 动态模型路由
showcases.description: LiteLLM 原生集成，轻松切换不同的模型供应商，实现智能负载均衡和成本最优的模型路由策略。

showcases.title: 全息可观测视界
showcases.description: 直观的数据与节点拓扑展示，所有的请求、资源开销以及智能体的状态尽在掌握中，真正做到所见即所得。

hero.title: Xworkmate
hero.subtitle: Covers App LiteLLM, OpenClaw, QMD and other smart agents and model routing scheduling, giving applications true AI native capabilities.

showcases.title: Smart Agent Matrix
showcases.description: Use advanced multi-agent architecture for task collaboration. Whether it is access to large models or accurate context-based responses, Xworkmate has you covered.

showcases.title: Dynamic Model Routing
showcases.description: LiteLLM natively integrated, easily switch between different model providers for intelligent load balancing and cost-optimal model routing strategies.

showcases.title: Holographic Observability
showcases.description: Intuitive data and node topology display, all requests, resource overhead, and agent status are under your control.
